response:
A business description for a Google My Business profile targeting first-time home buyers and home buyers in Orlando, FL, can be rewritten as follows:

**Business Description:**  
Established in 2002, Paul Giles & The Vintage Team at Compass is a real estate agency dedicated to providing expert guidance to homeowners and business owners throughout central Florida. Our team specializes in helping buyers and sellers navigate the real estate market, offering comprehensive support in all aspects of property transactions and financing. We are committed to building long-term relationships with our clients and ensuring a reliable, trustworthy experience from the beginning. Services include home buying, selling, and financing, with a focus on delivering personalized support and expert advice. We serve a variety of locations across Orlando, including Conway, Orlando, Maitland, Winter Park, Windermere, Altamonte Springs, Delaney Park, and the Lake Nona Region.
